arguments.command:
curl -s 'https://store-site-backend-static.ak.epicgames.com/freeGamesPromotions' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
elements = data.get('data',{}).get('Catalog',{}).get('searchStore',{}).get('elements',[])
for e in elements:
    title = e.get('title','')
    price = e.get('price',{}).get('totalPrice',{})
    orig = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('originalPrice','')
    disc = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('discountPrice','')
    promo = e.get('promotions')
    desc = e.get('description','')[:100]
    effective = e.get('effectiveDate','')
    print(f'Title: {title}')
    print(f'  Original: {orig} | Discount: {disc}')
    print(f'  Promotions: {promo}')
    print(f'  Effective: {effective}')
    print(f'  Desc: {desc}')
    print()
"

arguments.command: which wget || which curl || which python3

python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json
url = 'https://store-site-backend-static.ak.epicgames.com/freeGamesPromotions'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
data = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
elements = data.get('data',{}).get('Catalog',{}).get('searchStore',{}).get('elements',[])
for e in elements:
    title = e.get('title','')
    price = e.get('price',{}).get('totalPrice',{})
    orig = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('originalPrice','')
    disc = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('discountPrice','')
    promo = e.get('promotions')
    effective = e.get('effectiveDate','')
    desc = (e.get('description','') or '')[:120]
    dev = ''
    pub = ''
    for attr in e.get('customAttributes',[]):
        if attr.get('key') == 'developerName': dev = attr.get('value','')
        if attr.get('key') == 'publisherName': pub = attr.get('value','')
    # Check for current free promo
    is_current = False
    promo_start = ''
    promo_end = ''
    if promo:
        offers = promo.get('promotionalOffers', [])
        for offer_group in offers:
            for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
                start = offer.get('startDate','')
                end = offer.get('endDate','')
                promo_start = start
                promo_end = end
                if start and end:
                    from datetime import datetime
                    now = datetime.utcnow()
                    s = datetime.fromisoformat(start.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                    en = datetime.fromisoformat(end.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                    if s <= now <= en:
                        is_current = True
        upcoming = promo.get('upcomingPromotionalOffers', [])
        for offer_group in upcoming:
            for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
                start = offer.get('startDate','')
                end = offer.get('endDate','')
                print(f'  UPCOMING: {start} -> {end}')
    print(f'Title: {title}')
    print(f'  Original: {orig} | Discount: {disc}')
    print(f'  Promotions: {promo is not None} | Currently Free: {is_current}')
    print(f'  Promo: {promo_start} -> {promo_end}')
    print(f'  Effective: {effective}')
    print(f'  Dev: {dev} | Pub: {pub}')
    print(f'  Desc: {desc}')
    print()
"

arguments.command:
python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
url = 'https://store-site-backend-static.ak.epicgames.com/freeGamesPromotions'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
data = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
elements = data.get('data',{}).get('Catalog',{}).get('searchStore',{}).get('elements',[])
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
for e in elements:
    title = e.get('title','')
    price = e.get('price',{}).get('totalPrice',{})
    orig = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('originalPrice','')
    disc = price.get('fmtPrice',{}).get('discountPrice','')
    promo = e.get('promotions')
    desc = (e.get('description','') or '')[:150]
    dev = ''
    pub = ''
    for attr in e.get('customAttributes',[]):
        if attr.get('key') == 'developerName': dev = attr.get('value','')
        if attr.get('key') == 'publisherName': pub = attr.get('value','')
    is_current = False
    is_upcoming = False
    promo_start = ''
    promo_end = ''
    if promo:
        offers = promo.get('promotionalOffers', [])
        for offer_group in offers:
            for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
                start = offer.get('startDate','')
                end = offer.get('endDate','')
                promo_start = start
                promo_end = end
                if start and end:
                    try:
                        s = datetime.fromisoformat(start.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                        en = datetime.fromisoformat(end.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                        if s <= now <= en:
                            is_current = True
                    except: pass
        upcoming = promo.get('upcomingPromotionalOffers', [])
        for offer_group in upcoming:
            for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
                start = offer.get('startDate','')
                end = offer.get('endDate','')
                if start and end:
                    try:
                        s = datetime.fromisoformat(start.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                        if s > now:
                            is_upcoming = True
                    except: pass
    status = 'CURRENT FREE' if is_current else ('UPCOMING' if is_upcoming else ('PAST FREE' if promo else 'NOT FREE'))
    print(f'Title: {title}')
    print(f'  Status: {status}')
    print(f'  Original: {orig} | Discount: {disc}')
    print(f'  Promo period: {promo_start} -> {promo_end}')
    print(f'  Dev: {dev} | Pub: {pub}')
    print(f'  Desc: {desc}')
    print()
"

python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
url = 'https://store-site-backend-static.ak.epicgames.com/freeGamesPromotions'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
data = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
elements = data.get('data',{}).get('Catalog',{}).get('searchStore',{}).get('elements',[])
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)

# Get current free games with full promo details
for e in elements:
    promo = e.get('promotions')
    if not promo: continue
    offers = promo.get('promotionalOffers', [])
    for offer_group in offers:
        for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
            start = offer.get('startDate','')
            end = offer.get('endDate','')
            if start and end:
                try:
                    s = datetime.fromisoformat(start.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                    en = datetime.fromisoformat(end.replace('Z','+00:00'))
                    if s <= now <= en:
                        title = e.get('title','')
                        orig_price = e.get('price',{}).get('totalPrice',{}).get('fmtPrice',{}).get('originalPrice','')
                        desc = e.get('description','') or ''
                        print(f'=== CURRENT FREE ===')
                        print(f'Title: {title}')
                        print(f'Original Price: {orig_price}')
                        print(f'Free until: {end}')
                        print(f'Description: {desc[:300]}')
                        # Get tags
                        tags = e.get('tags',[])
                        print(f'Tag IDs: {[t.get(\"id\") for t in tags]}')
                        print()
                except: pass

# Get upcoming free games
for e in elements:
    promo = e.get('promotions')
    if not promo: continue
    upcoming = promo.get('upcomingPromotionalOffers', [])
    for offer_group in upcoming:
        for offer in offer_group.get('promotionalOffers', []):
            start = offer.get('startDate','')
            end = offer.get('endDate','')
            title = e.get('title','')
            orig_price = e.get('price',{}).get('totalPrice',{}).get('fmtPrice',{}).get('originalPrice','')
            desc = e.get('description','') or ''
            print(f'=== UPCOMING ===')
            print(f'Title: {title}')
            print(f'Original Price: {orig_price}')
            print(f'Start: {start}')
            print(f'End: {end}')
            print(f'Description: {desc[:300]}')
            print()
"

🆓 Epic免费游戏 🆓
📅 2026年5月7日

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**当前免费领取游戏：**

1️⃣ Oddsparks: An Automation Adventure - 原价：¥148 - 类型：自动化建造/冒险 - 介绍：设计自动化工坊，让可爱又奇特的Spark小精灵帮你搬运和制造一切，甚至包括它们自己！带领Spark小队探索奇幻世界，单人或在线联机均可，还能揭开Spark的古老秘密！

2️⃣ Firestone Online Idle RPG - 原价：免费基础版 - 类型：放置RPG/多人 - 介绍：一款多人奇幻放置RPG，收集英雄🧙‍♂️升级装备技能，挂机战斗或疯狂点击击败Boss！还能与公会好友聊天或参与PVP⚔️

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
